title: Usage Record
description: Immutable record of a single measurable dataspace usage event. Every usage record captures who (tenant, legal entity, counterparty), what (asset, service, API), how much (quantity, unit), when (event time, measurement interval), and under which agreement/policy — sufficient for rating, billing, and compliance audit.

recordId.description: Globally unique, stable record identifier. Must be deterministic per event for idempotent processing.

legalEntityId.description: Legal entity (BPN or internal) that this usage is attributed to

assetId.description: Optional asset identifier (dataset, API, connector, etc.) being consumed

serviceType.description: Service or resource type, e.g. data_transfer, api_call, connector_session

dimensions.description: Measured quantities — at least one dimension required

measurementInterval.description: Time window over which the measurement was taken

eventTime.description: When the usage event occurred (source time, not ingestion time)

reportedAt.description: When this record was written (ingestion time)

sourceSystem.description: System that generated this record, e.g. edc-extension, control-api

traceId.description: OpenTelemetry trace ID for correlation with operational spans

correlationId.description: Business correlation ID (e.g. negotiation ID, transfer process ID)

metadata.description: Optional additional key-value metadata for downstream enrichment
